strategy: High Risk / High Return - Aggressive Short-Term Stock Picks
analyst_note: Semiconductor and AI infrastructure names are leading the tape today as Q2 earnings season kicks off next week with several high-beta names reporting. Biotech is heating up with two PDUFA dates landing before July 25th creating binary event setups worth small speculative positions. Bitcoin reclaimed a key psychological level this week dragging MSTR and COIN sharply higher, and the short squeeze environment remains fertile in beaten-down fintech and small-cap AI names with elevated short interest meeting positive sector tailwinds. The risk-on tone is broad but fragile heading into CPI data next Wednesday - position sizing discipline is non-negotiable.
market_summary: Risk appetite is elevated across high-beta sectors with AI chips, crypto proxies, and speculative biotech all seeing institutional accumulation ahead of a catalyst-dense earnings week.

macro_backdrop.key_risk: Wednesday July 15 CPI print - a hot inflation number above 3.2% could trigger a sudden risk-off rotation and crush high-beta momentum names overnight.

picks.name: NVIDIA Corporation
picks.why_high_risk_high_return: NVDA is the highest-conviction AI momentum vehicle on the market. It regularly moves 8-15% around earnings and analyst events and is currently building toward a breakout to new highs on heavy institutional accumulation.
picks.thesis: NVDA is consolidating just below all-time highs with multiple sell-side firms raising price targets ahead of its August earnings, and Blackwell GPU supply constraints are easing per recent channel checks suggesting monster Q2 numbers. The stock is coiling in a tight bull flag on the weekly chart and a breakout above $1,080 triggers algorithmic buying programs that could carry it to $1,200 within two weeks.
picks.technical_setup: Bull flag consolidation between $1,020-$1,065 for 8 trading days. Volume dried up on the flag (healthy). MACD curling bullish on daily. RSI at 62 - not overbought. 20-day EMA at $1,010 acting as support. Breakout level is $1,075 on volume above 45M shares.
picks.catalyst: Q2 earnings pre-load + Blackwell GPU demand confirmation via partner announcements expected July 14-16. Street consensus EPS estimate has been raised 4 times in 30 days.
picks.buy_note: Place limit order at $1,055. Buy before July 14 to capture pre-catalyst drift. Do not chase above $1,085 - the edge is gone above that level.
picks.sell_note: Sell 50% of shares at $1,185 (conservative +12%). Let remaining shares run to $1,320 if volume confirms breakout. Exit ALL by July 24 regardless of price.
picks.stop_note: Hard stop if NVDA closes below $985 (below 20-day EMA and flag support). This level failing means institutional sellers are in control - exit immediately, no questions.
picks.volatility_profile: Very High - moves 5-12% on single news events
picks.exit_plan: Sell half at $1,185. Move stop to breakeven ($1,058) on remaining shares. Trail stop by $50 increments as stock climbs. Never let a winner reverse more than 8% from peak.
picks.risk_factors: Hot CPI print July 15 could trigger broad tech selloff. Any negative Blackwell yield or supply news crushes the thesis instantly. Stock is not cheap at current multiples.
picks.warning: HIGH RISK: Even NVDA can drop 15-20% in days on macro shocks. This is not a safe trade despite the large market cap.
picks.robinhood_steps: 1. Search NVDA  2. Tap Buy  3. Select Shares  4. Limit Order  5. Set price $1,055  6. Enter qty  7. Good Till Cancelled  8. Submit

picks.name: Palantir Technologies Inc.
picks.why_high_risk_high_return: PLTR is a high-beta AI software name with a passionate retail following, extremely high short interest for its size, and a pattern of moving 20-35% around earnings. Q2 report is expected July 28 with government AI contract wins acting as pre-catalyst.
picks.thesis: Palantir is accelerating commercial AI platform revenue and recently won two classified DoD AI contracts that haven't been fully priced in by the market, with Q2 earnings on July 28 expected to show the first quarter of $1B+ revenue. The stock broke out of a 3-week consolidation this week on volume 60% above average, a textbook institutional accumulation signal ahead of a major print.
picks.technical_setup: Breakout above $108 resistance on Thursday July 9 with volume 2.1x average. RSI at 68 and climbing. 50-day EMA at $95 far below - no overhead resistance until $125. Daily MACD just crossed bullish. Momentum is accelerating into earnings.
picks.catalyst: Q2 2026 earnings report expected July 28. DoD AI platform contract announcements anticipated in the week of July 14. Multiple analyst upgrades with price target raises.
picks.buy_note: Place limit order at $111. Enter early next week to capture pre-earnings drift and any DoD catalyst. Do not chase above $120 - risk/reward deteriorates sharply above that.
picks.sell_note: Sell 60% of shares at $128 before earnings. Let 40% ride into earnings only if you accept binary event risk. Exit ALL no later than July 30.
picks.stop_note: Stop below $102 which is the breakout retest level. A close below $102 means the breakout failed - exit full position same day.
picks.volatility_profile: Very High - retail momentum name, can gap 15% overnight
picks.exit_plan: Sell majority before earnings unless you want full binary event exposure. Trail stop to $108 (breakout level) after any 10% gain. Do not hold through earnings with more than 0.5% of portfolio.
picks.risk_factors: Valuation is stretched at current multiples. Any government spending freeze news kills the thesis. Earnings miss would cause 20-25% gap down. High retail concentration means flash crashes are possible.
picks.warning: HIGH RISK: Holding through earnings creates binary event risk. Stock can gap down 20%+ on any disappointment.
picks.robinhood_steps: 1. Search PLTR  2. Tap Buy  3. Select Shares  4. Limit Order  5. Set price $111  6. Enter qty  7. Good Till Cancelled  8. Submit

picks.name: MicroStrategy Inc.
picks.why_high_risk_high_return: MSTR is the highest-beta Bitcoin proxy stock available, historically moving 2-3x the percentage move of BTC. With Bitcoin reclaiming $105,000 this week and institutional ETF inflows accelerating, MSTR is coiled for a violent upside move.
picks.thesis: Bitcoin surged through $105,000 on Wednesday after BlackRock reported record spot ETF inflows of $1.2B in a single day, and MSTR's BTC holdings now represent a premium-valued treasury that retail and institutional investors are piling into as a levered BTC bet. The stock broke above its 30-day range high of $435 on Thursday with volume triple the 30-day average, a pattern that historically leads to 20-35% gains in the subsequent week.
picks.technical_setup: Clean breakout above $435 resistance on 3x average volume July 9. Weekly RSI at 71 but not extended given the prior 6-week consolidation. MACD on weekly chart just gave a bullish crossover for the first time since April. No overhead resistance until $520 range highs from February.
picks.catalyst: BTC holding above $105,000 with ETF inflow momentum. MicroStrategy quarterly BTC update announcement expected week of July 14. Bitcoin halving cycle historically bullish through Q3.
picks.buy_note: Place limit order at $442. Buy Monday morning if BTC holds above $103,000 over the weekend. Do not buy if BTC drops below $100,000 - the whole thesis changes.
picks.sell_note: Sell 50% at $510. Trail stop to $460 on remaining shares. Sell everything at $595 or by July 24 whichever comes first. BTC volatility means exits must be pre-planned.
picks.stop_note: Stop at $405 which is below the breakout and prior consolidation base. BTC dropping below $98,000 also triggers an immediate exit regardless of MSTR price.
picks.volatility_profile: Extreme - can move 15-25% in a single session
picks.exit_plan: Sell half at conservative target. Move stop to entry price ($442) on remaining half immediately after first 10% gain. This stock can reverse 20% in hours - protect profits aggressively.
picks.risk_factors: BTC weekend gap down is the primary risk. Regulatory crypto news could destroy the trade instantly. MSTR carries a premium to NAV that can compress violently. Macro risk-off wipes this out fast.
picks.warning: EXTREME RISK: MSTR can drop 20-30% in a single day if BTC sells off sharply. Weekend crypto moves create gap risk. 1% position size maximum.
picks.robinhood_steps: 1. Search MSTR  2. Tap Buy  3. Select Shares  4. Limit Order  5. Set price $442  6. Enter qty  7. Good Till Cancelled  8. Submit

picks.name: IonQ Inc.
picks.why_high_risk_high_return: Quantum computing is the hottest emerging technology theme of 2026 with government contracts accelerating, and IONQ is the only pure-play publicly traded quantum company with real commercial revenue. High short interest creates squeeze potential on any positive catalyst.
picks.thesis: IonQ signed two enterprise quantum cloud contracts with Fortune 100 clients last month that the market has not fully digested, and a DoE quantum computing infrastructure announcement expected this month could catalyze another institutional re-rating. The sector has seen $2B+ in government funding announcements in June-July 2026 and IONQ as the pure-play leader captures disproportionate momentum.
picks.technical_setup: IONQ broke above the $36.50 level that had capped three prior rally attempts, on volume 85% above 30-day average on July 8-9. RSI at 65 with room to run. 50-day EMA at $31.20 providing solid support base. Cup and handle pattern on weekly chart targeting $48-52.
picks.catalyst: DoE National Quantum Initiative funding announcement expected July 14-18. Q2 revenue update from IonQ expected late July. Sector peer Google Quantum AI publishing new benchmarks this month adding to sector hype.
picks.buy_note: Limit order at $38.00. Buy early Monday before any government announcement hits. Do not buy above $41 as the entry risk/reward becomes unfavorable.
picks.sell_note: Sell 50% of shares at $44.50. Let remaining shares ride to $54 if DoE catalyst hits and volume confirms. Exit all positions by July 25 as the catalyst window closes.
picks.stop_note: Stop below $34.50, which is back inside the prior consolidation range meaning the breakout failed. Close the position same day on a close below this level.
picks.volatility_profile: Extreme - small float quantum name, 15%+ daily moves common
picks.exit_plan: Sell half at $44.50. Move stop to $38 (entry) on remaining shares. This is a sector momentum play - if quantum sector cools, exit promptly regardless of price.
picks.risk_factors: Government announcement delay kills near-term catalyst. Quantum computing has no near-term commercial scale - any negative commentary on timeline crushes sentiment. High short interest could accelerate downside if support breaks.
picks.warning: HIGH RISK: Small float quantum computing stock. Can move 20%+ in either direction on headlines. News-driven, not fundamentals-driven.
picks.robinhood_steps: 1. Search IONQ  2. Tap Buy  3. Select Shares  4. Limit Order  5. Set price $38.00  6. Enter qty  7. Good Till Cancelled  8. Submit

picks.name: Coinbase Global Inc.
picks.why_high_risk_high_return: COIN is the highest-beta crypto equity and its revenue is directly correlated to BTC/ETH trading volumes which are surging. Q2 earnings will show a monster quarter and the stock typically pre-loads 15-25% in the two weeks before reporting.
picks.thesis: Coinbase Q2 trading volumes are tracking toward a record quarter with BTC above $100K driving retail and institutional activity, and the company's Base layer-2 network is generating significant fee revenue that analysts haven't fully modeled. Q2 earnings expected late July will be the catalyst but the pre-load trade from now into earnings is the higher-probability setup.
picks.technical_setup: COIN cleared $255 horizontal resistance on heavy volume Wednesday July 8. RSI at 66, MACD bullish crossover on daily. Prior high at $285 from March is the next major resistance. 20-day EMA at $238 provides a solid stop reference. Volume on breakout day was 2.4x 30-day average.
picks.catalyst: Q2 2026 earnings (expected July 29-31) will show record trading revenue. BTC above $105K drives daily volume data that gets publicly disclosed. SEC regulatory clarity on crypto assets announced in June removes an overhang.
picks.buy_note: Limit order at $260. Entry is clean given the recent breakout. Do not chase above $272 - the pre-earnings edge narrows significantly above that level.
picks.sell_note: Sell 60% at $295 pre-earnings. Remaining 40% hold into earnings only with full awareness of binary event risk. Exit all by July 30.
picks.stop_note: Stop below $240 which is below the breakout base and 20-day EMA. BTC crashing below $97,000 also triggers immediate exit.
picks.volatility_profile: Very High - moves 10-20% on BTC swings
picks.exit_plan: Sell majority before earnings. Trail stop to $255 after 10% gain. Never let this trade reverse more than 8% from peak - crypto correlates to BTC and reversals are fast.
picks.risk_factors: BTC weekend selloff directly tanks COIN. DOJ or SEC action (history here is real). Earnings miss on expenses even with revenue beat. Crypto market is 24/7 and weekend risk is real.
picks.warning: HIGH RISK: Crypto exchange stock mirrors Bitcoin volatility. 24/7 market means overnight and weekend gaps are common and large.
picks.robinhood_steps: 1. Search COIN  2. Tap Buy  3. Select Shares  4. Limit Order  5. Set price $260  6. Enter qty  7. Good Till Cancelled  8. Submit

picks.name: Rocket Lab USA Inc.
picks.why_high_risk_high_return: RKLB is the leading small satellite launch company with a high-profile Neutron rocket milestone approaching. Defense space spending is surging and RKLB wins contracts that can move the stock 25-40% on announcement.
picks.thesis: Rocket Lab's Electron rocket is booked 18 months out and a Space Force contract renewal of over $200M is expected to be announced in the July 14-21 window, which would validate the company's defense pivot and trigger a re-rating by institutional investors. The stock has been consolidating tightly for three weeks after a 35% run in June and the coiling action suggests another leg higher is imminent.
picks.technical_setup: Three-week tight consolidation between $23.50-$25.50 after a powerful June breakout. Volume contracting sharply during consolidation - classic bull flag. Support at $23 (50-day EMA). RSI reset to 52 from overbought. Breakout above $25.50 on volume triggers the next move.
picks.catalyst: Space Force contract announcement expected July 14-21. Neutron rocket development milestone update at upcoming investor day. DoD space infrastructure budget supplement announcement.
picks.buy_note: Limit order at $24.50 on any small pullback Monday. If the contract news hits before you can enter, do not chase above $27. Buy the consolidation, not the breakout.
picks.sell_note: Sell 50% at $29. Let remaining shares run toward $36 if the Space Force contract is announced and volume is strong. Exit all by July 25.
picks.stop_note: Stop below $22.50 which breaks the bull flag and 50-day EMA support. Close equals close below $22.50 means the setup has failed - exit immediately.
picks.volatility_profile: Very High - single contract news can move 20-30%
picks.exit_plan: Sell half at $29. Move stop to $24.50 (entry) on remaining shares. If contract announcement fails to materialize by July 21, exit the remaining position and take whatever gains exist.
picks.risk_factors: Contract delay or cancellation kills the thesis instantly. Launch failure would be catastrophic for sentiment. High valuation relative to current revenue. SpaceX competition is existential long term.
picks.warning: HIGH RISK: Small cap space company with binary event risk from contract announcements. News-driven stock.
picks.robinhood_steps: 1. Search RKLB  2. Tap Buy  3. Select Shares  4. Limit Order  5. Set price $24.50  6. Enter qty  7. Good Till Cancelled  8. Submit

picks.name: Upstart Holdings Inc.
picks.why_high_risk_high_return: UPST has 28% short interest and reports earnings July 29. The company's AI lending platform benefits directly from any Fed rate cut expectations, and recent consumer credit data suggests loan volumes are recovering. A beat and raise would torch the short sellers.
picks.thesis: Upstart's AI credit model is gaining market share as banks cut fintech partnerships and UPST steps in, with Q2 loan origination volume data from their lending partners suggesting a significant beat versus the $155M revenue consensus estimate. The stock has 28% short interest meaning a strong earnings report could trigger a short squeeze that amplifies the initial move by 50-100%.
picks.technical_setup: Forming a base above $48 support after a 3-month decline. RSI at 48 - coiled. Recent three-day bounce on above-average volume suggests accumulation. Key resistance at $58 - break above that on earnings could target $72-75. 200-day EMA at $45 acting as floor.
picks.catalyst: Q2 2026 earnings expected July 29. Fed minutes July 9 suggest rate cut path intact which directly benefits UPST loan economics. Short interest at 28% creates explosive upside if beat/raise is delivered.
picks.buy_note: Limit order at $51.50. This is a pre-earnings speculative entry betting on a beat. Buy early in the week. Do not enter above $56 - risk/reward for pre-earnings entry becomes too tight.
picks.sell_note: Sell 60% pre-earnings at $61 to lock in the pre-earnings run. Hold 40% through earnings only if accepting binary risk. Exit all by July 30.
picks.stop_note: Stop below $46 which breaks the multi-month base and 200-day EMA. A close below $46 means institutional sellers are active - exit fully.
picks.volatility_profile: Extreme - 40-60% earnings day moves are in UPST's history
picks.exit_plan: Sell majority before earnings catalyst. This is a pre-earnings momentum trade primarily. If holding into earnings, accept that the stock can gap down 30% on any guidance miss.
picks.risk_factors: Earnings miss on revenue or guidance gap down 35-40% overnight. Credit quality deterioration in AI model could cause regulatory scrutiny. Rate cut delays hurt the thesis. High short interest accelerates downside if thesis breaks.
picks.warning: EXTREME RISK: UPST has a history of 40-60% earnings day moves in BOTH directions. 1% position max. This is a pure speculative play.
picks.robinhood_steps: 1. Search UPST  2. Tap Buy  3. Select Shares  4. Limit Order  5. Set price $51.50  6. Enter qty  7. Good Till Cancelled  8. Submit

picks.name: Viking Therapeutics Inc.
picks.why_high_risk_high_return: VKTX has a Phase 2b obesity drug data readout expected before July 24. If VK2735 (oral GLP-1) shows superior efficacy to injectable competitors, this stock doubles. If data disappoints, it drops 40-50%. Pure binary event.
picks.thesis: Viking's oral GLP-1 agonist VK2735 Phase 2b data is expected in the next 1-2 weeks and early Phase 2 results showed best-in-class weight loss of 15.6% at 13 weeks, giving the drug a legitimate shot at disrupting the Novo Nordisk/Eli Lilly duopoly. A positive readout would trigger immediate acquisition speculation and a re-rating toward $80-90 based on the GLP-1 market opportunity, while a miss would take it back to $18-20.
picks.technical_setup: Stock has been slowly building from $28 support over 6 weeks as smart money accumulates ahead of data. RSI at 58. Low volume consolidation with occasional high-volume up days suggesting institutional accumulation. No clear technical target - this is a binary event play not a technical trade.
picks.catalyst: Phase 2b VK2735 oral obesity trial data readout expected July 14-24. Top-line weight loss and safety data will be the market-moving event. Any M&A speculation from larger pharma would be an additional catalyst.
picks.buy_note: Limit order at $37.50. This is a SMALL speculative binary event position only. Buy no more than half your planned position now - save remaining for any pre-data dip to $34-35 range.
picks.sell_note: If data is positive, sell 30% immediately on the spike. Sell another 30% as stock stabilizes. Hold 40% for potential M&A speculation run. If data is negative, sell immediately on open - do not average down.
picks.stop_note: Pre-data stop at $32. If the stock drops significantly before data release (suggesting a leak or sentiment shift), exit. After data release, stops are irrelevant - exit on opening print.
picks.volatility_profile: Extreme Binary - doubles or halves on data day
picks.exit_plan: This is a binary event. Plan your exit BEFORE data releases. Decide in advance: will you sell immediately on positive data spike, or hold for further run? Pre-planning prevents panic decisions. On negative data: SELL IMMEDIATELY at open.
picks.risk_factors: Data miss on weight loss percentage or safety signals causes 40-50% crash. Broader GLP-1 competitive data from Novo/Lilly before this readout could reset expectations. FDA clinical hold risk (low probability but exists).
picks.warning: EXTREME RISK: This is a pure binary event bet. The stock WILL move 30-50%+ on data day in one direction. Position size must be tiny. You can lose half your investment overnight.
picks.robinhood_steps: 1. Search VKTX  2. Tap Buy  3. Select Shares  4. Limit Order  5. Set price $37.50  6. Enter qty  7. Good Till Cancelled  8. Submit

picks.name: SoundHound AI Inc.
picks.trade_type: Small Cap AI Momentum / Short Squeeze
picks.why_high_risk_high_return: SOUN is a high-beta small cap AI name with 31% short interest that has been building a base. Any significant customer win announcement or partnership with a major auto or fast food chain could trigger a violent short squeeze in a thinly traded name.
picks.thesis: SoundHound's voice AI is deployed in 10,000+ restaurant locations and its automotive AI pipeline with major OEMs is expanding, with a key Stellantis global expansion announcement expected this month that would roughly double its automotive revenue run rate. The stock has 31% short interest and a small float meaning even moderate buying pressure creates explosive price action.
picks.technical_setup: Consolidating above $10 support for 4 weeks after a spike to $13.50 in June. RSI reset to 45 - neutral. Moving average coil with 20-day EMA crossing above 50-day EMA (bullish). Any move above $12 on volume brings in momentum buyers and starts covering shorts. Float is very small at 180M shares.
picks.catalyst: Stellantis global deployment expansion announcement expected July 14-21. Quarterly revenue update showing 90%+ YoY growth rate. Any AI industry conference presentations in this period could catalyze retail buying.
picks.buy_note: Limit order at $11.00. Buy on any morning dip early next week. Small float means fills at limit price are not guaranteed - use limit orders only, never market orders.
picks.sell_note: Sell 50% at $13.50 (prior high resistance). Let remaining shares run to $17.50 if short squeeze momentum ignites. Exit all by July 25 regardless.
picks.stop_note: Stop below $9.80 which breaks the 4-week consolidation base. Small cap names fall fast - do not wait for a bounce on a breakdown.
picks.volatility_profile: Extreme - small float AI squeeze candidate
picks.exit_plan: Sell half at first resistance target. If short squeeze ignites above $13.50, trail stop by $1 increments. Small cap squeezes reverse violently - take profits aggressively, don't get greedy.
picks.risk_factors: Partnership announcement delayed or smaller than expected. Revenue growth deceleration would crush the high-multiple valuation. Small float means institutional exits are also violent. Competition from Google, Amazon voice AI is real.
picks.warning: EXTREME RISK: Very small cap, very high short interest. This can lose 25% in hours if sentiment shifts. Strictly 0.5-1% position size.
picks.robinhood_steps: 1. Search SOUN  2. Tap Buy  3. Select Shares  4. Limit Order  5. Set price $11.00  6. Enter qty  7. Good Till Cancelled  8. Submit

picks.name: Super Micro Computer Inc.
picks.why_high_risk_high_return: SMCI is the AI server buildout infrastructure play that has been recovering from its accounting controversy. With Q4 fiscal year earnings due late July showing massive NVIDIA GPU server demand, this stock can move 25-40% on a clean earnings report that proves the controversy is behind them.
picks.thesis: Super Micro's AI server demand from hyperscalers is at record levels driven by Blackwell GPU deployments, and the company's Q4 fiscal 2026 earnings (expected July 28-30) should show revenue of $6.5-7B versus $5.3B consensus as order intake data from their supply chain confirms massive AI infrastructure spending. The stock is trading at half its prior highs despite a clean audit completion and the recovery trade has significant room.
picks.technical_setup: SMCI has been building a base between $40-$48 for 6 weeks after a recovery from the $20s. RSI at 55, neutral with upside room. Breaking above $48 resistance would clear the way to $62-65. Volume has been building on up days - accumulation pattern. 50-day EMA at $43 provides stop reference.
picks.catalyst: Q4 fiscal 2026 earnings expected July 28-30. Clean audit confirmation reinforces governance recovery thesis. NVIDIA Blackwell GB200 rack orders being fulfilled exclusively through SMCI for certain hyperscaler customers.
picks.buy_note: Limit order at $46.00. Enter this week as institutional pre-earnings accumulation likely underway. Do not chase above $50 - reward diminishes significantly above that entry.
picks.sell_note: Sell 50% at $55 pre-earnings. Hold remaining for earnings beat scenario targeting $68. Exit all no later than July 30.
picks.stop_note: Stop below $41 which breaks below the 50-day EMA and the recent accumulation base. Any new accounting or governance news also triggers immediate exit.
picks.volatility_profile: Very High - accounting history means sentiment can shift violently
picks.exit_plan: Sell half before earnings to reduce binary risk. Trail stop to $46 (entry) after any 10% gain. Do not hold full position through earnings given the stock's history of violent swings.
picks.risk_factors: Any new accounting irregularity disclosure would be catastrophic. Revenue beat with margin miss would disappoint. Competition from Dell and HP in AI servers is intensifying. Stock still carries an uncertainty premium from 2024-2025 controversy.
picks.warning: HIGH RISK: SMCI has a history of governance issues. Any hint of renewed accounting problems causes catastrophic declines. Small position only.

news_signals.why: Clinical registry update confirming the data readout window has opened accelerates the pre-catalyst accumulation trade as institutional biotech funds begin building positions.

news_signals.headline: Space Force Awards Five New Smallsat Launch Contracts Worth Combined $800M to Rocket Lab, SpaceX
news_signals.why: Confirms Space Force smallsat launch budget expansion is real and ongoing. Rocket Lab as sole Electron launch provider captures significant portion of new contract awards.

daily_wisdom: The market rewards the prepared and punishes the emotional. Set your targets BEFORE you enter, set your stops BEFORE you enter, and then let the trade work. The moment you start adjusting stops downward to avoid taking a loss, you've already lost - you're just negotiating the size of the disaster.
risk_warning: EXTREME RISK: Every pick in this list is a highly speculative short-term trade that can lose 20-50% of invested capital rapidly. Biotech binary events can gap down 40-60% overnight. Crypto-linked stocks can lose 20% over a weekend. Small cap momentum names can reverse 30% in hours on thin volume. These are NOT suitable for retirement funds, emergency savings, or any capital you cannot afford to lose entirely. Position size discipline is the ONLY protection - never exceed 1-2% of total portfolio per position. This is NOT financial advice. Always conduct your own due diligence. Past patterns do not guarantee future results. Buy shares only - no margin, no leverage, no derivatives.
